고린도후서 2:1.content: But I determined this for myself, that I would not come to you again in sorrow.

고린도후서 2:2.content: For if I make you grieve, then who will make me glad but he who is made to grieve by me?

고린도후서 2:3.content: And I wrote this very thing to you, so that, when I came, I wouldn’t have sorrow from them of whom I ought to rejoice; having confidence in you all, that my joy would be shared by all of you.

고린도후서 2:4.content: For out of much affliction and anguish of heart I wrote to you with many tears, not that you should be made to grieve, but that you might know the love that I have so abundantly for you.

고린도후서 2:5.content: But if any has caused sorrow, he has caused sorrow, not to me, but in part (that I not press too heavily) to you all.

고린도후서 2:6.content: This punishment which was inflicted by the many is sufficient for such a one;

고린도후서 2:7.content: so that on the contrary you should rather forgive him and comfort him, lest by any means such a one should be swallowed up with his excessive sorrow.

고린도후서 2:8.content: Therefore I beg you to confirm your love toward him.

고린도후서 2:9.content: For to this end I also wrote, that I might know the proof of you, whether you are obedient in all things.

고린도후서 2:10.content: Now I also forgive whomever you forgive anything. For if indeed I have forgiven anything, I have forgiven that one for your sakes in the presence of Christ,

고린도후서 2:11.content: that no advantage may be gained over us by Satan, for we are not ignorant of his schemes.

고린도후서 2:12.content: Now when I came to Troas for the Good News of Christ, and when a door was opened to me in the Lord,

고린도후서 2:13.content: I had no relief for my spirit, because I didn’t find Titus, my brother, but taking my leave of them, I went out into Macedonia.

고린도후서 2:14.content: Now thanks be to God, who always leads us in triumph in Christ, and reveals through us the sweet aroma of his knowledge in every place.

고린도후서 2:15.content: For we are a sweet aroma of Christ to God, in those who are saved and in those who perish:

고린도후서 2:16.content: to the one a stench from death to death, to the other a sweet aroma from life to life. Who is sufficient for these things?

고린도후서 2:17.content: For we are not as so many, peddling the word of God. But as of sincerity, but as of God, in the sight of God, we speak in Christ.
